summary: Verified BUG FIX for empty space below product card action buttons on /shop and homepage Latest arrivals (desktop), plus mobile regression checks. Fix (md:flex-1 on inner details div) works as intended — mt-auto now correctly pins action buttons to card bottom with only normal card padding (~21px) below them.

desktop_1920x800_shop.result: PASS - no large empty gap; buttons pinned to bottom with ~21px (card padding) below

desktop_1920x800_homepage_latest_arrival.result: PASS - no empty gap; buttons pinned to bottom

mobile_390x844_shop.result: PASS - compact 2-col grid, square images, small Add button, no trailing gap

mobile_390x844_homepage.result: PASS - both grids render as 2-column square card grids

critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.jsx: fix is minimal and correct (md:flex-1 enables mt-auto). motion.div + Card retain md:h-full for equal-height rows. Layout cleanly separates mobile vs desktop via Tailwind responsive classes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified on iteration 8. ProductCard now pins action buttons to card bottom with ~21px padding (the card's md:p-5 padding) on desktop both on /shop (4-col) and homepage Latest arrivals (3-col). Mobile layout unchanged and clean. No regressions observed.
rca of the issue: Previous bug: details div had md:h-full which made it a fixed-height block — this broke mt-auto on the actions div because the parent was not a flex item that could grow, leaving a large blank region under the buttons. Fix: change md:h-full -> md:flex-1 so the details container is a flex child that grows to fill the equal-height card; mt-auto then correctly pushes the action buttons to the bottom. Verified visually and via getBoundingClientRect — gap between actions bottom and card bottom is now exactly the card padding (21px).
